content:
I've completed updating all frontend view files in `web/src/views/system/` with the new field name mappings. Here's a summary of all changes made:

## Files Modified (12 total):

### User Module:
1. **`user/utils/types.ts`** — Changed type definitions: `sex` → `gender` (string|number), `status` → `isActive` (boolean), `remark` → `description`
2. **`user/utils/hook.tsx`** — Updated all field references:
   - `form.status` → `form.isActive`
   - Column `prop: "sex"` → `prop: "gender"`, `row.sex` → `row.gender`
   - Column `prop: "status"` → `prop: "isActive"`, el-switch v-model to `scope.row.isActive` (removed active-value/inactive-value integer bindings)
   - Status switch logic: `row.status === 0` → `!row.isActive`, rollback: `row.isActive = !row.isActive`
   - API calls: `{ status: row.status }` → `{ isActive: row.isActive }`
   - Form data: `sex` → `gender`, `status` → `isActive`, `remark` → `description`
   - Tree filter: `treeList[i].status === 0` → `!treeList[i].isActive`
3. **`user/form/index.vue`** — Updated form defaults: `sex` → `gender`, `status: 1` → `isActive: true`, `remark` → `description`; Renamed `sexOptions` → `genderOptions`; Updated all v-model bindings and labels
4. **`user/index.vue`** — Updated search form: `v-model="form.status"` → `v-model="form.isActive"`, prop `status` → `isActive`, option values from `"1"`/`"0"` to `:value="true"`/`:value="false"`

### Role Module:
5. **`role/utils/types.ts`** — Changed `remark` → `description`
6. **`role/utils/hook.tsx`** — Updated all field references:
   - `form.status` → `form.isActive`
   - Column: el-switch v-model to `scope.row.isActive` (removed active-value/inactive-value)
   - Column `prop: "remark"` → `prop: "description"`, label "备注" → "描述"
   - Status switch logic: `row.status === 0` → `!row.isActive`, `row.status === 1` → `row.isActive`, rollback: `row.isActive = !row.isActive`
   - API calls: `{ status: row.status }` → `{ isActive: row.isActive }`
   - Form data: `remark` → `description`
7. **`role/index.vue`** — Updated search form: `v-model="form.status"` → `v-model="form.isActive"`, option values to boolean
8. **`role/form.vue`** — Updated form defaults: `remark` → `description`, v-model and label updated

### Department Module:
9. **`dept/utils/types.ts`** — Changed `sort` → `rank` (number), `status` → `isActive` (boolean), `remark` → `description`
10. **`dept/utils/hook.tsx`** — Updated all field references:
    - `form.status` → `form.isActive`
    - Columns: `prop: "sort"` → `prop: "rank"`, `prop: "status"` → `prop: "isActive"`, `prop: "remark"` → `prop: "description"`
    - Tag renderer: `tagStyle.value(row.status)` → `tagStyle.value(row.isActive)`, `row.status === 1` → `row.isActive`
    - Filter: `item.status === form.status` → `item.isActive === form.isActive`
    - Tree filter: `treeList[i].status === 0` → `!treeList[i].isActive`
    - Form data: `sort` → `rank`, `status` → `isActive`, `remark` → `description`
11. **`dept/index.vue`** — Updated search form: `v-model="form.status"` → `v-model="form.isActive"`, option values from `:value="1"`/`:value="0"` to `:value="true"`/`:value="false"`
12. **`dept/form.vue`** — Updated form defaults: `sort: 0` → `rank: 0`, `status: 1` → `isActive: true`, `remark` → `description`; Updated all v-model bindings and labels; Removed active-value/inactive-value from el-switch

No `permissionIds` references were found in the role view files.
